papers.title: SUGAR: A Scalable Human-Video-Driven Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation Learning Framework
CEER: Compliant End-Effector and Root Control as a Unified Interface for Hierarchical Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
papers.summary: 本文提出CEER框架，通过 Compliance-aware 的末端执行器-根部（EE-root）任务空间控制抽象，结合教师-学生蒸馏方法，将复杂全身控制器简化为低维 EE-root 命令接口，实现模块化的人形机器人 loco-manipulation 分层控制。

papers.title: Domain-Adaptive Communication-Rate Optimization for Sim-to-Real Humanoid-Robot Wireless XR Teleoperation
Adversarial Stress Testing of SPARK Humanoid Safety Filters
EgoTraj: Real-World Egocentric Human Trajectory Dataset for Multimodal Prediction

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus Completes Water Handoff: Grasp-Transfer Progress Arrives Weeks Before Fremont Ramp - Tech Times
companyNews.summary: **摘要**：Tesla Optimus机器人实现水传递与抓取转移功能新进展，表明其精细操作能力持续提升，为未来商用落地奠定技术基础，推动人形机器人行业向实际应用更进一步。

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus Caught Handing Out Water in New Demo - BASENOR - Tesla Accessories
companyNews.summary: Tesla Optimus机器人在演示中展示递水功能，体现了特斯拉推进人形机器人进入实际服务场景的努力，展示其在服务型机器人领域的技术进步。

companyNews.title: The Bar Just Keeps Getting Higher for Tesla’s Robots - Barron's
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉人形机器人技术标准不断提升，行业竞争加剧，推动整个产业加速发展。

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus Pilot Production Line Gets First Look on Video - BASENOR - Tesla Accessories
Tesla Model S and Tesla Model X Production Face an Uncertain Future as Optimus Robots Take Priority - Techgenyz
companyNews.summary: Tesla将资源向Optimus人形机器人项目倾斜，Model S/X产可能受限。此举标志着汽车龙头加速布局人形机器人赛道，推动行业商业化进程。
